arts.ttl: Arsenal prepare HUGE Saliba deal amid Real Madrid rumours
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly prepared a contract extension offer for William Saliba as they look to fend off significant transfer interest from Real Madrid . The Gunners have already prepared their contract offer, although they aren’t set to enter into negotiations for several months, with the club aiming to complete a deal ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid given major fitness boost ahead of Champions League derby
arts.sum: Real Madrid are already struggling with injuries as they prepare for their Champions League derby clash with Atletico Madrid on Tuesday night, but Los Blancos can breathe a little easier. It appears Fede Valverde is scheduled to be on the pitch at the Santiago Bernabeu.
